message:
feat: migrate MCP audit logging to structured DecisionContext type

Replace ad-hoc serde_json::Map construction with the typed
DecisionContext struct throughout MCP audit logging, improving
compile-time validation and consistency with the policy audit trail
infrastructure.

crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp.rs:
- mcp_audit_decision_context() now builds and returns a DecisionContext
  struct instead of constructing raw JSON maps, using typed fields for
  surface, action, actor, timestamp, and evidence
- mcp_event_mutation_decision_context() updated to initialize
  DecisionContext with proper input_summary, timestamp_ms, and
  structured evidence entries via add_evidence() API
- Test assertions refactored to deserialize decision contexts as typed
  DecisionContext structs with a helper evidence() function for field
  lookup, replacing raw JSON map access

crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp_tools.rs:
- All tool-level audit context construction migrated from raw JSON to
  DecisionContext builder pattern
- Evidence entries now added via typed add_evidence() calls instead of
  map insertion, ensuring consistent key naming and serialization
- Test coverage updated to validate DecisionContext fields through
  typed deserialization rather than JSON value checks

crates/frankenterm-core/src/policy.rs:
- Fix field reference: changed self.message to rule.message in
  config_rule_trace_reason() for correct rule message attribution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
